rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit pass, improving register and clarity without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged multiple uncertainties and provided clear placeholders for missing information.
rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adhered to the requested scope with no deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and all changes were improvements.
rationale.RX.5: While major edits were traced, minor ones lacked annotations.
